response.justification: Strong senior full-stack engineer with 15+ years of experience, current role at re:cinq involves TypeScript/Node.js plus AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — directly matching the JD's AI agent requirement and primary stack. Solid background in React, MongoDB, Docker, and craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based). Gaps: no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest mentioned, and the resume is light on cloud-platform specifics beyond AWS CDK at Optilyz.
strengths: Current hands-on experience with TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators
15+ years across full-stack, with strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Proven polyglot delivery (TS, Java, DLang, C/C++, Swift) plus React, MongoDB, Docker, and Kubernetes exposure
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest, both listed in the primary stack
Kotlin not listed; Java experience exists but appears dated (robotic arms, mobile orchestration ~2016-2018)
Cloud-platform depth is unclear — only AWS CDK is named, no GCP/Azure or broader infra detail

key_factors.factor: AI agent + MCP experience at re:cinq
